text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning and start my day with a glass of water and a short meditation. After a quick breakfast, I walk to work, which takes about twenty minutes. My work schedule runs from 8:30 a.m. to 5:00 p.m., with a lunch break when I often read or listen to music. In the evening, I spend thirty minutes exercising—usually jogging or doing yoga. Then I have dinner, watch an episode of a TV show, and read for a while before bed. I go to sleep around 10:30 p.m. This routine is very consistent, and it helps me feel organized and healthy.
